title: Spermacoce balansae

This family is part of the order Gentianales and consists of around 13,000 species, many of which are tropical in nature. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects.
